auspicious_beast_summoning.core_effects: user covers their face to become a spirit medium and summons four auspicious beasts to aid in combat

black_bird_manipulation.core_effects: track the world through the eye of a crow

blood_manipulation.core_effects: control the flow of blood in and out of the body to create projectiles and harden defenses
blood_manipulation.limitations: limited amount of blood in body

boogie_woogie.core_effects: swap locations of any two objects/individuals in the area with cursed energy, including self
limitations: only affects things with cursed energy
limited range around sorcerer

core_effects: transfer the consciousness of the user into a deceased person's body by transplanting the user's brain into the corpse
allows user to use the techniques of the deceased person
transfers the memories of the deceased person to the user

comedian.core_effects: whatever the user finds funny manifests in reality
comedian.limitations: if user doubts their own comedic abilities, it renders the technique mostly useless

construction.core_effects: user creates something through expenditure of significant cursed energy

copy.core_effects: gain the ability to use another's cursed technique by consuming part of the other sorcerer
copy.limitations: requires eating part of the other sorcerer

cursed_energy_enhancement.core_effects: enhance cursed energy output, capacity, and/or efficiency in another being
cursed_energy_enhancement.limitations: purely supportive, no direct offensive or defensive applications

cursed_speech.core_effects: user can speak in a way that curses others
limitations: harms user's throat
can inadvertently curse self or others

cursed_spirit_manipulation.core_effects: total control over cursed spirits defeated in battle after consuming their essence
cursed_spirit_manipulation.limitations: requires consuming the essence of a cursed spirit through physical contact after defeating it in battle, and it tastes disgusting

disaster_flames.core_effects: control over fire, magma, and meteors

divergent_fist.core_effects: powerful punch followed shortly after by a massive burst of cursed energy

enlightened_scripture.core_effects: Summon shikigami spirits drawn into being through ink on paper, or through origami via folding inked paper into autonomous projectiles.
limitations: shikigami are flammable and easily destroyed through use of fire attacks
the creation and summoning of shikigami takes valuable time early in a fight if not prepared in advance

core_effects: converts cursed energy into cursed spores that produce fast-growing fungi
species of fungi produced vary based on the user's intent, and can be used for a variety of purposes such as offense, defense, and healing
fungal_manipulation.limitations: subject to environmental factors such as temperature and humidity

core_effects: The user imbues cursed energy into writing or drawing with the ability to detonate the 'cursed glyphs' later.
This can be effective with conventional or nonstandard writing and drawing utensils, so long as a mark is made.
Undetonated glyphs gradually lose power for a day or two before all potency is lost and they are no longer able to be used.
glyphic_manipulation.limitations: takes significant strategy, preparation, and access to the area to prepare to its maximum effectiveness.

idle_transfiguration.core_effects: reshape victims' bodies by altering the shape of their souls

core_effects: creates virtually any effect that both the user and the target believes possible
imaginary_technique.limitations: effects become useless when the nature of the technique is understood

core_effects: grants the user the ability to continue living forever
limitations: body ages despite never dying
requires assimilation of Star Plasma Vessels to maintain humanity

inverse.core_effects: receives blows that are inversely proportional to the power of the attack, so that weaker attacks cause more damage and stronger attacks cause less damage
inverse.limitations: has minimum and maximum power thresholds that limit its effectiveness

judgeman.core_effects: user can judge the worth of a person in the 'court' of his domain, and they will be inflicted with whatever sentence judgeman deems just if they are found guilty
limitations: user must comply with judgeman's verdict
opponent may be found not guilty
opponent has the right to an appeal

limitless.core_effects: control over cursed energy on a molecular level; allows user to infinitely slow anything approaching them to the point that they appear to stop
limitations: extremely difficult to master
requires the six eyes to master fully

miracles.core_effects: for the price of forgetting small graces that happen to them each day, the user gains the opportunity to survive otherwise fatal blows
limitations: limited miracles per day

core_effects: allows the user to project their own movements forward at 24 frames per second
forces the opponent to react in 24 fps too, or else their movements are frozen for one second
limitations: must obey the laws of physics
can freeze the user as well if they are not careful

puppet_manipulation.core_effects: ability to use cursed energy to manipulate multiple puppets from a great range

purification_flame.core_effects: violet conceptual flame burns cursed energy but not physical matter

ratio_technique.core_effects: striking an opponent at a specific point on their body, based on its ratio of the length in 7:3, will cause significant damage to the opponent
ratio_technique.limitations: requires physical striking and precision to be effective

core_effects: slashing technique that creates incisions in an instant from a range
'Cleave' is used against living opponents or curses
'Dismantle' is used against inanimate objects
shrine.limitations: single method of attack must be supplemented by physical prowess or creative applications

simple_domain.core_effects: protection from the effects of a domain

core_effects: perception of cursed energy and reality on a molecular level
enables sight even when blindfolded
can harness solar energy as cursed energy and put it to use in various ways
flexible technique with combat and practical applications
limitations: technique ineffective when the sun isn't visible

core_effects: by concealing himself and others with a sheet, the user can teleport himself and others to another location
can spatially transfer himself or others across vast distances within a short time
spatial_transference.limitations: can only be used twice per month on any given person

core_effects: manipulate cursed energy through a hammer, nails, and a straw doll
enables long-range, resonant damage by using a target's body part as a proxy, and close-combat, explosive, or area-of-effect damage on opponents
limitations: requires materials on hand to use
useless against gaseous or liquid attacks

core_effects: uses cursed energy to remotely manipulate objects, mostly non-living ones
wide array of uses, including flipping switches, opening doors, throwing objects, causing damage to objects, etc.
limitations: larger/more complex object manipulation depletes cursed energy quickly
limited range

core_effects: summon various shikigami through the medium of shadows
after being given divine dogs black and white, user must fight and defeat each shikigami in battle to tame and use it
divine dogs white and black are attuned to cursed energy and have limited offensive use
nue is an electric bird useful for reconnaissance that can bear its user's weight
toad can harmlessly carry individuals to safety
max elephant sprays large quantities of water over opponents
rabbit escape creates cover for user to escape contact
mahoraga is an enormous humanoid shikigami with the ability to endlessly adapt to any fighting style or technique
user can physically enter shadows and use them for storage
limitations: taxing to maintain
mahoraga nearly impossible to tame
user bears the weight of whatever is stored inside their shadows

core_effects: active mind-reading capabilities
minor, passive ability to impact the will of others
gains greater ability to read and affect those who have shared intimate thoughts
limitations: only has access to conscious thoughts
access limited with strangers/distant acquaintances

core_effects: allows the user to freely manipulate a sorcerer's broomstick by levitating it telepathically
grants the user the ability to levitate on the tool or create gusts of powerful wind imbued with cursed energy
limitations: very limited use
only affects one broomstick

core_effects: While in Gorilla Mode, each of the user's strikes will resonate throughout their target's body
Even if their opponent blocks, the impact will still damage the target with all the intended force of the attack.
limitations: requires accessing gorilla core
easily countered by powerful technique
